steps.title: Meet Up
steps.text: Hello explorer, thanks for coming with us today. There are currently some sightings of a wolf, you see on your device there is a scan distance and bearings. Distance tells us how far away you are from the designated point while bearings tells you if you are facing the right direction. Firstly lets meet up, use that tool and meet us within 20 meter of that spot

steps.title: Track the Scent
steps.text: Good, we will need you to track down the wolf scent, one of our hunters has placed a transmitter on it. Only bearings will work for this

steps.title: Break Contact
steps.text: ....static, you hear a lot of static, is the radio being jammed? Leave the area and get 50 meter away

steps.title: Activate EMP
steps.text: That is not a wolf! It is a drone controlled wolf. Someone is controlling it to spy on people. they must have seen us, I need you to activate our EMP. You can do so by radioing in within 20 meter at that destinated point Time limit: 8 minutes

steps.title: Escape Blast
steps.text: Get away from the EMP Blast! Time limit:3 minute distance:50 meter away

steps.title: Mission Success
steps.text: Good job! we disabled the drone, it is only a matter of time before we find the owner

steps.title: Failed – EMP Not Activated
steps.text: Dammit it escaped! We will just have to wait for it next time

steps.title: Failed – Radio Knocked Out
steps.text: The radio was knocked out,without it you are unable to contact the team...or capture the wolf
